content_of_post_to_answer: What are the different types of human mentality?
answer: Human mentality is less about fixed types and more about the lenses through which people interpret life. The same person can shift from a survival mindset during crisis to a growth mindset when secure. What separates mentalities is often not intelligence, but the questions people habitually ask: “How do I protect what I have?” or “What can I learn from this?” Our repeated questions quietly shape our reality.
